hero.subtitle: A trail run through the mountains around Berge by the Høyanger fjord. Join us for an unforgettable experience.

intro.label: About the race
intro.title: Run where nature sets the limits
intro.text: Berge Trail Run is a trail running race in the mountains around Berge, just outside the Høyanger fjord. The course takes you through varied terrain with views over fjord and mountains. Hosted by the family hotel Larsgarden Tunhotell — whether you're an experienced runner or just want to try something new, there's a place for you.

signup.label: Sign up
signup.title: Ready for the challenge?
signup.text: Secure your spot in Berge Trail Run 2026. Limited number of places.

story.label: Our story
story.title: How it started
story.p1: This is where you tell the story behind the race. What inspired you to create it? What does Berge mean to you? What is the vision?
story.p2: This section gives space for the personal story that makes the race unique. People want to know who's behind it and why.

footer.contact: Questions? Get in touch at hei@bergetrailrun.no
